import React from 'react'; import { Menu, X, User } from 'lucide-react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; interface NavbarProps { isLoggedIn?: boolean; } const Navbar: React.FC = ({ isLoggedIn = false }) => { const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = React.useState(false); return (

{isLoggedIn ? (
John Doe
) : ( <> Sign In )}
{/* Mobile menu button */}
{/* Mobile Navigation */} {isMenuOpen && (
setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Home setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Scenarios setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Marketplace setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Dashboard setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Multiplayer setIsMenuOpen(false)}>About setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Contact
{isLoggedIn ? (
John Doe
) : ( <> setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Sign In setIsMenuOpen(false)}> )}
)}
); }; export default Navbar;
